prompt: Show European capitals as colored points by region (Western, Nordic, Eastern). Use a categorical color scheme.
Map earthquake events across the Pacific Ring of Fire. There are thousands of events so cluster them at low zoom levels.
Create a choropleth map of population density by country in Europe. Normalize by area and use a blue sequential palette with 5 classes.
Visualize reported crime incidents in central Stockholm as a heatmap. Weight by severity score.
Show major world cities with circle sizes proportional to their population. Color by continent.
Map international trade flows between major European ports. Line width should represent trade volume in tonnes. Use curved arcs.
Show 10, 20, and 30 minute cycling accessibility zones from Stockholm Central Station.
Map election results by municipality in Sweden. Use a diverging blue-red color scheme to show vote margin between the two leading parties.
Create a density surface of public WiFi hotspot locations in Paris.
Visualize migration patterns between Nordic countries. Show direction and weight by number of migrants.
Map EU member states with bubbles sized by GDP. Color by GDP per capita using a green sequential scheme.
Show 15 and 30 minute driving isochrones from Gothenburg airport.
